rabbit-rice-recipe-comedera.name: Rabbit Rice Recipe
rabbit-rice-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de arroz con conejo casero fácil

ingredients.item: 1/2 cucharadita de comino en polvo al gusto

instructions: To start with, let's make sure that rabbit's meat's well clear and minced into pieces.

If we decide to preserve the viscers (especially the liver), they have to be clear as well. In that case, we will pour an oil jet into a pot, large frying pan or paella, and we will fry them there for 5 minutes or till they are well cooked, stirring constantly. We'll put them back later.
Then we'll get a condiment or padded for the rice. The first thing we'll do will be peeling your garlic teeth. Then we'll put them in a mortar.
Then we'll wash the pepper and clear his head and open his head and remove his branches and his vein. We'll cut him into some pieces and put him into his mortar as well.
We'll add half a teaspoon of cumin, half a teaspoon of oregano and the same amount of salt.
Then we will wash up the parsley well and scattering and add branches to the mortar and a teaspoon of olive oil and vinegar.
Majaremos bien todo y reservaremos el condimento.
Luego, nos ocuparemos de los tomates. Los lavaremos, los cortaremos en tres o cuatro trozos irregulares y los colocaremos en la licuadora, con un toque de sal y pimienta.
Once we have obtained a purée, we can optionally pass it through a pallet to remove the seeds. Then we'll put them back.
Ahora pelaremos la cebolla y la picaremos en cuadritos.
In a pot, frying pan or paella, we will warm up some oil and cook the onion for 5 minutes, with medium-low heat, stirring constantly.
Pasado este tiempo, incorporaremos los trozos de carne de conejo, salpimentados al gusto, y los doraremos.
When the rabbit's golden, we'll get him out of the frying pan and put him back.
Instead, we'll add the tomato purée and let them cook a few minutes. Then we'll add the condiment we had previously booked and let them both cook for 5 minutes.

Then we'll get the rabbit back to cooking (also the old ones, if we're going to use them), mix them all up, and we'll try the salsa to check the date. If necessary, we will correct with a little more salt and / or pepper and soon mix again.
We'll have the rabbit with the white wine and we'll mix and we'll give him 5 minutes to evaporate his alcohol.
To continue, we will pour the broth, mix and hope that it will break to boiling.

At this point, we'll add the rice. We will place it so that it will be covered with the liquid and we will let it be cooked at medium-high heat until the liquid will be reduced and the grain will start to look again.

Then we'll put the fire down to a minimum and hope that the rice will finish cooking. The production of rice normally takes about 15 to 20 minutes between both phases. The potential difference is due to factors such as cooking power, using pot, paella or frying pan, and differences in bottom thickness, among others.
When the rice's ready, we'll leave it to put up for some moments before serving.

radish-rainbow-salad.name: Radish Rainbow Salad
instructions: Thinly slice half of radishes on a mandoline and place in a large bowl. Leave remaining radishes whole if small, or slice in half or into wedges if larger and place in same bowl. Season well with kosher salt and squeeze and scrunch radishes several times with your hands to work salt into flesh. Squeeze lemon halves to get 3 Tbsp. juice; save one half for zesting later. Add lemon juice to bowl and finely grate half of cheese over radishes; toss well to coat. Using a fork, crumble remaining cheese into bowl. Add basil and 2 Tbsp. oil and toss again. Taste and season with more kosher salt if needed.
Transfer salad to a platter. Drizzle with more oil, sprinkle with sea salt and pepper, and finely grate zest from reserved lemon over.

ramen-noodle-soup-argiro.name: Ramen Noodle Soup
instructions: This ramen soup with chicken (ramen noodles), is an easy recipe for a fantastic Japanese dish!
First we marinate the chicken fillet.
In a bowl, add all the ingredients and chicken, cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and touch it on a baking pan lined with parchment paper.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 200 °C for 15 ́.
In the meantime, mix the sugar and soy and spread the chicken.
Keep baking for 10 more minutes.
Allow the grilled chicken to rest and slice.
We're getting the ramen ready.
Place the chicken broth in a pot.
Add the garlic and ginger, fresh onion, pepper, soy and mire.
Add to boat for 20′.
In another pot with boiling water, boil the noodles in half a year from what is stated.
Drain and divide in 2 bowls.
Drain the broth, put it back in the pot and add the mushrooms.
Boil for 5 minutes.
Divide the broth with the mushrooms in the bowls.
Garnish the chicken and sprouts with the eggs.
Serve the ramen hot immediately.

ranchy-roasted-potato-fans-made-on-the-g.name: Ranchy Roasted Potato Fans Made On The Grill
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for low heat and lightly oil the grate.
Combine olive oil and ranch dressing mix in a small bowl; set aside.

Place 1 potato onto a cutting board with a wooden spoon on each side. Make cuts across potato down to the spoons, about ¼-inch apart. Repeat with remaining potatoes. Place potatoes in a heat-proof dish; add onion.
Spoon oil-ranch mixture evenly over potatoes and onion. Cover the dish tightly with aluminum foil; place on the grate.
Cook on the preheated grill until potatoes are golden brown, about 30 minutes, flipping every 10 minutes.

ravioli-and-mushroom-skillet.name: Ravioli And Mushroom Skillet

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Heat broiler. Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large ovenproof skillet over medium. Cook 8 oz. button mushrooms, sliced ½" thick, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned, about 2 minutes. Add 1 large shallot, finely chopped, and 3 garlic cloves, finely chopped; cook, stirring often, until just starting to soften, about 1 minute. Pour in ¼ cup dry white wine and cook, scraping up any browned bits, until liquid is evaporated, about 2 minutes.

Add 2 cups heavy cream, 3 Tbsp. thyme leaves, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and season generously with freshly ground pepper. Bring to a bare simmer and add 1 cup finely grated Parmesan and stir to combine. Add two 9-oz. packages fresh or frozen, thawed cheese ravioli and cook, stirring to melt cheese and coat ravioli, until sauce thickens slightly, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat.

Crush 2 cups store-bought fried onions (about 3.5 oz.) in a small bowl to panko-size pieces. Add 1 tsp. finely grated lemon zest and remaining ¼ cup finely grated Parmesan and toss to combine; season with pepper. Sprinkle over ravioli mixture and broil until lightly browned and crisp on top, 2–3 minutes.

recipe-for-buns-stuffed-with-zucchini-ha.name: Recipe For Buns Stuffed With Zucchini, Ham And Cheese
recipe-for-buns-stuffed-with-zucchini-ha.original_name: Receta de bollitos rellenos de calabacín, jamón y queso

red-curry-chicken-and-pumpkin-soup.name: Red Curry Chicken And Pumpkin Soup

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced, or more to taste

instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a soup pot over high heat. Add chicken to hot oil; cook, stirring occasionally until browned, about 5 minutes.

Stir in 1/2 of the red onion and brown sugar. Cook until onions have softened and sugar starts to caramelize on the bottom of the pan, about 3 minutes. Stir in black pepper, cumin, and 1 teaspoon kosher salt. Toss in ginger and garlic; stir until sizzling, about 1 minute.

Add 4 cups chicken broth and stir to deglaze the bottom of the pot. Bring to a boil. Add coconut milk and curry paste. Add cayenne pepper and bay leaf. Stir in fish sauce. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes.
Carefully cut squash with a large knife on a cutting board. Remove seeds and peel and discard skin. Cut flesh into bite-sized pieces. You should have about 1 1/2 pounds squash.
Add squash to soup and salt to taste. Add remaining chicken broth to cover squash. Simmer over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, until pumpkin is just barely tender, 15 to 20 minutes.
Stir in remaining red onion, bell pepper, and green onions; cook for 2 minutes. Turn off the heat, and stir in 1/2 cup cilantro and 1/4 cup basil. Taste and adjust seasonings.
Ladle into bowls and garnish with more cilantro, basil, green onions, and serrano chiles. Squeeze lime juice into each bowl.

refreshing-grape-sorbet-comedera.name: Refreshing Grape Sorbet

ingredients.item: 200 gr de uvas moradas o mixtas, lavadas y despalilladas
50 g of sugar (you can suit your taste)
1 cdita de licor de uva o ron para un toque adulto

instructions: Put grapes, water and sugar in a blender. Processes to get a soft purée.
Cuela la mezcla con un colador fino para eliminar pieles y semillas, asegurando un sorbete sedoso.
Add lemon juice and liquor if you wish. Remix.
Fold production into a freezer-suitable container.
Congela for 3-4 hours, stirring every 30-40 minutes with a fork to break the ice crystals and achieve a smoother texture.
Sirve en copas individuales y decora con hojas de menta fresca o unas uvas enteras.

refreshing-mint-smoothie-lezzet.name: Refreshing Mint Smoothie
instructions: 1. Take the whole material from the blender to the service cup.

refreshing-summertime-salad.name: Refreshing Summertime Salad
instructions: Combine baby greens, mango, watermelon, feta cheese, red onion, and mint in a large bowl.
Whisk vinegar, olive oil, and mango juice concentrate together in a small bowl until well combined; drizzle over salad and toss gently until evenly coated.

renees-strawberry-rhubarb-pie.name: Renee's Strawberry Rhubarb Pie
instructions: Whisk cornstarch and 1 tablespoon water together in a large bowl until combined; stir in rhubarb, strawberries, white sugar, vanilla extract, cinnamon, and lemon juice. Set filling aside for 30 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).

Roll out half dough on a floured surface to fit a 9-inch pie plate; place in pie plate and refrigerate until ready to use. Roll top crust on a floured surface into a 10-inch circle. Cut into 1-inch wide strips with a sharp paring knife or pastry wheel; set aside.

Stir filling; pour into the prepared pie plate. Moisten the rim of the crust with a small amount of water. Start with the longest dough strips and lay the first 2 in an X in the center of the pie. Alternate horizontal and vertical strips, weaving them in an over-and-under pattern. Use the shortest strips for the edges of the lattice. Press strips down on crust rim to seal; trim excess. Beat egg white and 1 teaspoon water together in a small bowl; brush over lattice top. Sprinkle with turbinado sugar. Wrap aluminum foil strips around edges of pie.

Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes. Reduce the oven temperature to 191°C (190 degrees C); bake until crust is golden and filling is bubbling, 40 to 45 more minutes. Remove aluminum foil for the last 10 minutes of baking time. Cool pie completely before serving.

reunion-rum-punch.name: Reunion Rum Punch
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a saucepan; pour into a mug and brew chai tea for 5 minutes. Remove tea bag and mix brown sugar into the hot tea until dissolved. Allow tea to cool for about 10 minutes.
Mix tea, pineapple juice, rum, vermouth, and vanilla-flavored syrup together in a large punch bowl; stir well. Chill for at least 2 hours before serving.

ribs-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Ribs In The Oven
instructions: Spread the ribs and add salt and pepper on both sides.
In the blender, add all the ingredients of marinade and completely paste them.
We wet and wrinkle a large anti-stick baking pan. Open and spread it in a baking pan that fits the ribs into a layer.
Put the ribs in order to fit everything in a layer.
Add the marinade. Let them stand for 15 minutes.
We turn them around on the other side.
We wet anti-stick paper and wrinkle it to soften.
We cover the ribs very well.
Place in a preheated oven at 180°C in the air on the medium grill.
Bake for about 45′ to brown.
Uncover them in the liquids of the baking pan and continue baking for about 20 minutes to brown and soften so that the meat falls off the bone.
Serve them with their sauce, broken potatoes & season salad.

After this time, we will have an oven pressurized with heat up and down at 22020 C.
We batilate our eggs with a pint of salt and some minced fresh parsley leaves. We put in the mix and distribute it throughout the surface. Let's get into the oven and bake about ten minutes.
We get out of the oven and cover with an aluminium cloth or paper, let them rest about 5 minutes.
We serve and only have to enjoy this excellent plate.

ricotta-gnudi.name: Ricotta Gnudi
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a gentle boil.
Meanwhile, combine ricotta cheese, 1/2 cup Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, egg, salt, pepper, and nutmeg in a bowl; mix well. Add in 00 flour.
Sift in semolina flour and carefully fold into ricotta mixture until semolina flour is just incorporated and a soft dough forms.
Place dough on a lightly floured work surface and cut dough into 4 pieces. Roll each section into a long rope about 3/4 inch in diameter.
Cut the rope into 1-inch long pieces with a butter knife. Use your forefinger and press down into the middle of each gnudi to create a small dimple. Set the gnudi on a lightly floured baking sheet.
Drop gnudi in batches into the simmering water and cook until they float to the surface, less than 1 minute.
Drain gnudi and transfer to bowls.
Meanwhile, heat marinara sauce in a saucepan until hot, about 5 minutes.
Top each portion generously with marinara sauce, Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese, and basil ribbons.

risotto-with-asparagus-argiro.name: Risotto With Asparagus

ingredients.item: 600 gritty green asparagus cleaned and cut into pieces 1 cm. (we keep some whole for garnishing)
4-5 cup hot chicken or vegetable broth (water that boils asparagus is ideal)
600 gritty green asparagus cleaned and cut into pieces 1 cm. (we keep some whole for garnishing)
4-5 cup hot chicken or vegetable broth (water that boils asparagus is ideal)

instructions: First heat the asparagus for 2′ and pour them into cold water to cut the boat and main the green color.
Then we drain them.
We melt half the asparagus until they become mashed potatoes.
In pan melt the butter and sauté the garlic and onion to become transparent.
Remove the garlic after 1′-2′, add the rice and mix to butter well.
Add the wine and let the rice suck all the liquids.
Start adding from 1/2 to 1 cup of broth at a time.
Every time before we add, he must have drunk his previous fluids.
Add salt and pepper.
After the rice becomes an al dente and is poured externally, add the asparagus cream, butter and parmesan.
Pull from the fire and mix.
Finally, add the hot asparagus and mix well.
Serve immediately on hot dishes and garnish with 1 egg Posé each serving, some radial asparagus on the plate and parmesan peels.
Optionally serve with lemon cut into quarters.
We're dipping with some aure oil.

risotto-with-dried-tomatoes-and-mushroom.name: Risotto With Dried Tomatoes And Mushrooms
risotto-with-dried-tomatoes-and-mushroom.original_name: Risotto de tomates secos y setas
instructions: Comenzamos picando las setas y los tomates secos en tiras y reservamos.
The onion's been minced into small cubes.

Calentamos a fuego medio una olla grande con 1 cucharada de mantequilla. Agregamos la cebolla y la pochamos durante varios minutos hasta que se transparente y empiece a cambiar de color (no quemarse, cuidado).
Then we added the mushrooms and the dried tomatoes and scrambled a few more minutes.
Agregamos el arroz, lo revolvemos un poco y empezamos a echar el caldo de verduras poco a poco.
That part's important and you have to be attentive all the time. It's about stirring the rice without stopping with a big stick spoon as you add the liquid. Don't put them all up with a single blow.
The broth will gradually dry and you have to add more and more fluids. Always stirring with his spoon.
During this process, you have to check for good salt and if necessary, add them.
When 20 minutes have passed, the rice should have been creamy and soft to the tooth (dente).
At this time you will add goat cheese to your cravings, a little more butter (1 teaspoon you will stir for 1 more minute.
Retira del fuego, agrega queso parmesano rallado y sirve.

roast-chicken-with-matzo-stuffing-and-ca.name: Roast Chicken With Matzo Stuffing And Cauliflower-spinach Puree

ingredients.item: Fresh rosemary sprigs plus 2 tablespoons chopped fresh rosemary
Fresh thyme sprigs plus 2 tablespoons chopped fresh thyme

instructions: Place 2 small racks side by side in 1 large roasting pan. Stuff chicken cavities with lemon wedges, shallots, rosemary sprigs, and thyme sprigs. Tie legs together loosely and tuck wing tips under; rub outside of each with 1 tablespoon chicken fat. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Place chickens on racks in pan. Sprinkle each chicken with 1 tablespoon each chopped rosemary, thyme, and parsley. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Let stand at room temperature 1 hour before continuing.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Roast chickens uncovered until cooked through and juices from thigh run clear when pierced with small knife or thermometer inserted into thickest part of thigh registers 74°C to 77°C, turning pan once for even browning, about 1 hour 20 minutes. Transfer chickens to platter. Tent very loosely with foil. Let rest 20 minutes. Pour pan juices into small saucepan; reserve.
Cut each chicken into 8 pieces. Spread about 1/2 cup Cauliflower-Spinach Puree on each plate. Top with chicken and spoon stuffing alongside. Rewarm pan juices; spoon over chicken and serve.
Brian and Chieun serve 2005 Lucien Crochet 'Croix du Roy' Sancerre Rouge, France ($30) with roasted chicken. For a kosher alternative, try 2005 Abarbanel Pinot Noir, France ($25).

roast-pork-loin-with-rosemary-and-garlic.name: Roast Pork Loin With Rosemary And Garlic
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Finely chop garlic and rosemary with 1/2 teaspoon salt on a cutting board. Holding knife at an angle, drag blade over mixture until a coarse paste forms. Transfer paste to a small bowl and mix in oil.

Place pork, fat side down, on another cutting board with a short end toward you. Holding a sharp knife parallel to board and about 1/2 inch up side of loin, make an incision along entire length of one side. Continue cutting, lifting meat with your free hand as you go, until loin is open and flat. Spread garlic mixture over inside of loin and season with salt and pepper. Roll pork tightly; using kitchen twine, tie at 1 inch intervals.

Season pork with salt and pepper; place, fat side up, in a large shallow baking dish. Add wine; roast pork until an instant-read thermometer inserted into thickest part of loin registers 145°, 1 1/2–2 hours. Transfer to a carving board; let rest at least 10 minutes.
Spoon fat from surface of pan juices; discard. Slice pork; serve with pan juices.
DO AHEAD: Pork can be stuffed and tied 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before roasting.

roast-rack-of-lamb-with-fingerling-potat.name: Roast Rack Of Lamb With Fingerling Potatoes, Asparagus, And Tapenade

ingredients.prep: no larger than 1 inch in diameter

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Brush a roasting pan with oil. Spread 2 Tbsp. tapenade evenly over lamb and place lamb, bone side down, in center of pan. Toss asparagus with 1 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and set aside. Roast lamb for 6 minutes.

Meanwhile, place remaining 1 Tbsp. oil, 1 Tbsp. tapenade, and potatoes in a medium bowl; toss to coat potatoes. Arrange potatoes in a single layer around lamb. Continue roasting until potatoes are crisp on the edges, golden brown, and tender and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of lamb registers 135°–140° for medium to medium-rare, 15–20 minutes. Remove lamb and potatoes from oven.
Roast asparagus until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes.

Meanwhile, transfer lamb to a cutting board. Divide potatoes between plates. Stir remaining 1/2 Tbsp. tapenade, wine, and 2 Tbsp. water in pan over medium heat, scraping up browned bits, until sauce reduces slightly, about 1 minute.
Cut lamb into individual chops. Arrange lamb and asparagus on plates with potatoes, dividing evenly. Drizzle lamb and potatoes with sauce.

roasted-cauliflower-with-capers-and-parm.name: Roasted Cauliflower With Capers And Parmesan
instructions: Arrange a rack in lowest position of oven; preheat to 450°. Place 1 head of cauliflower on a cutting board and snap off green outer leaves. Use knife to shave off end of stem to create a flat surface on which the cauliflower can stand upright.
Starting from one end, cut entire head of cauliflower into ½" slices, letting the pieces fall where they may. The pieces connected to the root will remain intact in planks.

Transfer cauliflower to a rimmed baking sheet and drizzle with 3 Tbsp. oil. Season with salt and pepper and toss with your hands to make sure pieces are evenly coated, then arrange so they’re resting on a flat cut surface.

Roast cauliflower on bottom rack until pieces are browned around the edges and undersides are deeply browned all over, 25–30 minutes.
→  You can serve roasted vegetables cold too, you know
While cauliflower is roasting, grate 1 oz. Parmesan on the large holes of a box grater. Set aside about half for garnishing.

Coarsely chop 1 Tbsp. capers, then toss all capers in a small bowl with remaining 2 Tbsp. oil. Cut 1 lemon in half and squeeze in juice.
→  What even are capers, anyway?

When cauliflower is ready on the first side, remove baking sheet from oven and place on a work surface. Using a spatula, turn pieces over so browned sides are facing up. Sprinkle Parm NOT set aside for garnish over cauliflower.
Return sheet to oven and continue to roast until second side of cauliflower is browned and Parm is toasty smelling and browned, 10–12 minutes.
Let cool a few minutes, then transfer cauliflower to a plate with spatula and drizzle lemon-caper dressing over.
Season with a bit more salt and pepper, then top with reserved Parm.

roasted-chickpeas-with-salad-argiro.name: Roasted Chickpeas With Salad

ingredients.item: 1gar tender and thin (not thick with seeds)
1gar tender and thin (not thick with seeds)

instructions: Drain very well the chickpeas in a colander to cool.
Put the chickpeas on a clean absorbent towel.
We wipe them very well.
Dry them completely by rubbing them with the towel.
Put the chickpeas in a baking pan.
Add the olive oil and add the salt.
Mix them to oil around with a spoon.

Place them in the oven and make them in a well preheated oven at 160oC in the air for about 45’ until golden and crispy. In the middle of the baking process, shake the baking pan 2-3 times to make evening around.
Once they are cooked, they become crispy and while they are warm, sprinkle them with spices.
Mix them with the spices.
When they cool, add them to the bowl with the salad or keep a few and enjoy them as crisp and healthy snacks.
Alternatively garnish your soups with grilled chickpeas.

roasted-eggplant-and-crispy-kale-with-yo.name: Roasted Eggplant And Crispy Kale With Yogurt

ingredients.prep: quartered lengthwise, cut crosswise into 1-inch pieces
ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely torn

instructions: Preheat oven to 450°. Toss eggplants with vegetable oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Roast, tossing halfway through, until eggplants are charred in spots and tender, 20–25 minutes. Remove from oven, sprinkle with mango powder (if using) and cumin, and toss to coat.

Meanwhile, heat a dry large skillet, preferably cast iron, over medium-high. Add kale, arranging to fit in a single even layer (work in batches if needed), and cook, turning occasionally, until charred in spots and crisp, about 4 minutes.
Grate cucumber on the medium holes of a box grater; squeeze out excess liquid with your hands and transfer to a medium bowl. Mix in yogurt, lemon juice, and garlic; season with salt.
Toss tomatoes with a good pinch of salt and a drizzle of olive oil in a medium bowl. Spoon yogurt mixture onto a platter and layer eggplants, kale, and tomatoes on top. Drizzle with more olive oil.

roasted-pork-banh-mi-vietnamese-sandwich.name: Roasted Pork Bánh Mì (vietnamese Sandwich)
instructions: Toss radish and carrot with seasoned rice vinegar in a bowl until well coated. Let sit until veggies become slightly limp, 15 to 20 minutes. Drain and set aside or refrigerate.

Mix mayonnaise, hoisin sauce, and sriracha in a small bowl. Split French roll just enough so you can open it like a book. Pull out some of the bread from the top half to better accommodate the filling if desired. Spread the interior surfaces of roll liberally with mayonnaise mixture.
Transfer roll, cut-side up, to the prepared baking sheet. Bake in the preheated oven until warm and crisp with slightly browned edges, about 7 minutes.
Place sliced pork, paté, pickled radish and carrot, cucumber, jalapeño, and cilantro leaves in warm roll. Cut in half to serve.

roasted-zaatar-potatoes.name: Roasted Za'atar Potatoes

ingredients.prep: such as The Little Potato Company® dynamic duo potatoes

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.
Place potatoes in a large bowl. Add olive oil, za'atar, and salt; stir to coat. Spread potatoes in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven for 12 minutes. Stir potatoes and roast for an additional 12 minutes. Stir once more and cook until crispy, about 4 more minutes. Garnish with parsley.

rosemary-and-dried-cherry-pork-chops.name: Rosemary And Dried Cherry Pork Chops
instructions: Combine ⅓ cup dried tart cherries and ½ cup hot water in a small bowl. Let sit to rehydrate while you cook the pork.

Pat two 1"–1¼"-thick bone-in pork chops (10–12 oz. each) dry with paper towels. Season generously on both sides with kosher salt and freshly ground pepper. Sprinkle 3 Tbsp. all-purpose flour evenly over both sides of each chop; press in gently to coat lightly.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high. Shake off any excess flour and cook pork chops until deep golden brown underneath, about 5 minutes. Turn and cook until deep golden brown on other side and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part registers 135°, about 2 minutes, depending on thickness of chops. Transfer to a plate. Let pan cool slightly.

Combine 1 large shallot, thinly sliced, and 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter in same pan and cook over medium heat, stirring often, until shallot is softened, about 2 minutes. Add 2 cups low-sodium chicken broth, 2 Tbsp. Dijon mustard, 1 Tbsp. balsamic vinegar, and reserved cherries with their liquid. Cook, stirring constantly, until slightly reduced, about 5 minutes. Add 2 sprigs rosemary and cook, stirring often, until sauce thickens further and is homogeneous, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat, add remaining 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, and vigorously stir to combine. Taste sauce and season with salt and pepper.

To serve, nestle pork chops back into sauce in pan and spoon
some sauce over.

rosemary-buttermilk-chicken.name: Rosemary Buttermilk Chicken

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Mix buttermilk, garlic, paprika, salt, and pepper together in a large bowl; stir to combine.

Massage rosemary sprigs to release fragrant oils. Put rosemary in a large resealable plastic bag; pour in buttermilk mixture. Add chicken parts to the bag, seal carefully, and place in refrigerator. Marinate, turning the bag occasionally, 4 hours to overnight.
Preheat grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.

Transfer chicken to a plate; discard marinade. Grill chicken until no longer pink at the bone and the juices run clear, turning a few times, 20 to 30 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted near the bone should read 74°C (74 degrees C).

rosy-gin-kombucha-cocktail.name: Rosy Gin-kombucha Cocktail
instructions: Stir gin, Campari, lemon juice, and ginger in a pint glass or measuring cup. Stir in kombucha. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into an ice-filled Collins glass. Garnish with lemon wedges.

russian-chicken-salad-teleculinaria.name: Russian Chicken Salad

ingredients.item: 600 g de frango cozido e desfiado (metade)

instructions: Peel the carrots and potatoes and cut them into small cubes. Wipe the green beans and cut them into cubes as well.
Cook the carrots, potatoes, peas and beans in salted water, then drain and let it cool.

The mayonnaise: place the yolk in a bowl, add some salt, mustard and English sauce and stir very well. Add the mixture of olive oil with the oil, in thread, always stirring. If it gets too thick, add a few drops of vinegar. Retrieve the spices, add a few more drops of vinegar and mix. Add to the vegetables and involve. Pinch the eggs and put them over the salad, sprinkle with the salt and serve to taste.

rye-fit-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Rye Fit Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of full wheat flour can be used oatme flour or speclt; a lighter and nutritious dough is obtained.
You can try the buckwheat flour or kinoa instead of the rye flour; increases the fiber rate.
A classic texture can improve the full wheat flour rate of inner bark.
Instead of milk, milk or oats milk can be used; lighter and vegan versions are suitable for for.
Herbal yoghurt instead of yogurt (soya or coconut) can be preferred.
Instead of olive oil, sunflower oil, avocado oil or coconut oil can be used.
Instead of white cheese, you can use lor cheese, goat cheese or less salty ricotta.
Spinach for vegetable mortar, pumpkin or carrot you can add rendesi.
A sweet version can fill with to lor cheese and little honey.
Instead of eggs, less olive oil or yogurt suede can get a drink and light top surface.
Susam can increase both appearance and spell value.

instructions: 1. Mix milk and powder sugar, add fruits and wait for 5–10 minutes.
2. Add yogurt and olive oil, add salt.
3. Slowly knead a soft dough by adding the flour of wheat and veccedil;avdar.
4. If necessary, you can add 1–2 tablespoons of water.
5. Leave the dough on top 45–60 minutes to swim.
6. Kü from dried dough;push parçs copar, inner mortar and close and oval shape.
7. Connect the optional egg.
8. Öfrom 180 degrees Celsius to 20–25 minutes, u cook until the girl.
9.  Afiyet olsun.
